chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1967 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For orders as to non-prosecution of main petition as notices not issued as cost and copies not supplied. 10.08.2022 Mrs. Razia Ali Zaman Khan advocate holding brief on behalf of Mr. Ahmed Murtaza A. Arab, advocate for petitioners. Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajpar, Assistant A.G. Sindh. Mr. Nazar Muhammad Memon, Addl.P.G Sindh. ----- Learned counsel for the petitioners has filed this petition essentially seeking protection and defence against harassment caused by the police officials at the instance of private respondents. Learned Assistant Advocate General Sindh and Additional Prosecutor General Sindh both undertake that the petitioners would be dealt with in accordance with law and action if any taken would be only when justified under the relevant law. In view of above, this petition having served its purpose is accordingly disposed of along with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
